name: Fresh Apple Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs and grated apples to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift in the flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt, then stir until combined.
4. Fold in the pecan pieces and buttermilk, stirring gently until just incorporated.
5. Stir in the vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 10x6x3 inch loaf pan, spreading evenly.
7. Sprinkle the remaining sugar and cinnamon mixture on top of the bread.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool before slicing and serving.
Recipe yield: 1 loaf
